title: Dermal Filler Complications Mastery | Elearning | Dr Tim Pearce
filename: Dermal Filler Complications Mastery ｜ Elearning ｜ Dr Tim Pearce.en.vtt
excerpt: Hey did you know that most practitioners think it's only then that actually have anxiety about complications and follow-ups and then they also think reading about it and going on forums and looking at pictures is what it takes to get over that worry but it's not am i less importa…

segments.text: hey did you know that most practitioners think it's only then that actually have anxiety about complications and follow-ups and then they also think reading about it and going on forums and looking at pictures is what it takes to get over that worry but it's not am i less important sometimes it makes things get much worse I'd like to revolutionize the way that you approach this problem and forever change your understanding of how to master complications and protect your patients and yourself from litigation and your clinic from reputational damage for those of you don't know me I'm dr. sim Pierce and I'm a director of a Skin Clinic called skin Viva and also skin beaver training one of the biggest training academies in the UK but I want you to know that I've also been in that awful position of feeling out of my depth ever worried about complications and side effects in fact I used to lose sleep over them I would often wake up in the small hours replaying the patients I'd seen and worrying about what could happen I had a fear of finding myself and not knowing what to do while a person I treated was in danger in fact

there was a day when I actually asked myself seriously whether it was all worth the worry or whether I should stick to my safe NHS team where responsibilities felt shared rather than all in my head I had to make a choice in those early days and although I considered it seriously I realized also that I couldn't face a life solely in the NHS well there's no space for me to give my best no need for my creative side and no time to connect with people properly and really help them rewrite their stories and have better lives it was during this difficult time that I had my first realization I remember vividly the anxiety every time my phone went off that I would need to react to a problem I was not in complete control of a problem that I knew full well could lead to litigation a bad reputation or legal battles that could run on for years I realized that my life is becoming like that film remember the Blair Witch Project that film was really scary without you

ever seeing anything scary shaky camerawork noises from outside of shot and a general lack of awareness of where the danger was it was basically using the fear of the unknown probably the greatest fear there is to terrify the audience I realized that this was my first problem I didn't know what all the problems could be there seemed to be so many I realized during this week that I needed to face the issue square on part of me had been relying on the low probability of problems to get me through but there were too many what-ifs I had to make complications a priority for a while in order to free me from the worry that was slowing down my progress and ruining the experience of growing a clinic the next realization I had was that information alone was not enough googling and going on support groups actually just made me worry more the pictures in the uncertainty that seemed to be the main message of these groups actually made me feel worse what happened to cause the complication how is it diagnosed what else could it be what happened next how could this be avoided next time my

second realization was that I needed more than just awareness of the problems you don't need a pile of information and gory pictures hidden in the corner reminding me that problems occur I realized that I needed to integrate my knowledge of complications into daily functions of my practice of course you absolutely need that knowledge but it's the daily processes informed from that knowledge that keep your patients safe and give you the sense of control and confidence you need not to worry at the end of every day you can finally start to worry less and inject more and grow your business without the fear of getting sued and losing it all you're probably thinking this sounds like a lot of work but don't worry I found a way to teach this in a way that fits around your busy life and integrates into your day so that you can quickly mask this problem set and feel safer immediately the next realization I had is that you cannot become confident with complications just by reading about them the idea here is you need to develop your own decision-making pathways by linking your factual knowledge to real-life cases and thinking through real scenarios this is important because

patients never present like textbook say as cases are written down for publication nuances loss and diagnosis seems easier than it actually was I discovered the hard way that theoretical knowledge didn't give me the confidence I craved this only occurred when theory is tested on reality you must get experience but without the risk the idea here is that you learn the most when thinking through real cases with real people on the other end of decisions made I've created a way of exposing you to this without the risk this is important because you need to lay down the pathways in your mind that make complex decisions easy without the normal risks and getting it wrong because when it happens for real you only get one chance and it's under pressure I know what you're thinking this is a lot of work the truth is I don't think there's ever been a faster easier or safer way to master complications than this process for the last six months I've been busily updating and articulating everything I've learned in 11 years and developed an e-learning program like no other I

can't wait to introduce you to it it's called a complication mastery program and I built it specifically for you I wish is that you'll be able to identify and handle every one of the major complications and side effects you will ever come across in medical esthetics and that this will set you free from worry and enable you to surge forward with building your practice while keeping your patients safe let me tell you a bit more about it what makes this so special is the fact that you won't only have access to incredibly detailed set of video tutorials covering every complication you're likely to face you also get access to painstakingly Illustrated protocols to aid you to rapidly diagnose and manage all the major complications you could see it's really bring home the reality of some of the rarest complications I've also found and interviewed clinicians and patients who have faced the worst of the worst complications including stroke visual loss and anaphylaxis nothing will make you all learning more relevant than hearing these real stories to keep you and your patients safe I'm also including an updated version of the

safety system I use in my clinic as well as the protocols to guide you through diagnosis there are carefully worded consent forms and aftercare leaflets designed to protect your patients from harm and you from litigation you can even add your own logo and edit the wording to fit your brand of course you'll get immediate access to all these resources but to make sure you follow through on every we're also going to release the course in bite-size segments to watch on a closed Facebook group you'll be able to ask questions and discuss cases with me and your colleagues and get practical advice if you need it at the end of each segment we'll be testing your knowledge with an MC cue and you'll earn a graphic certificate to promote yourself to your clients for every module past if there's one thing that clients care more about the price it's safety so I really want you to promote yourself using this course and so what this is going to do is instantly give you access to some amazing learning material and resources and start you off on your way to mastering esthetic complications so what I've had to do is to demystify complications and turn what was once a dark cloud of uncertainty into a

brightly lit set of 31 different problems all mapped out beautifully explained and analyzed so that you can navigate out of harm's way and grow in confidence just like I have if you want to join me on this program all you need to do is follow the link to purchase the course and you can start your journey in protecting yourself and your patients immediately I hope you'll enjoy this so click the link today while it's still available at this price we're always here to help and I can't tell you the amazing results we've gotten from ascetic practitioners just like you who rightfully worried about complications and follow-ups my great wish for you is that you will feel confident and fully equipped to take care of your patients if the worst happens I can't wait to see you on the other side

Brightly lit set of 31 different problems all mapped out beautifully explained and analyzed so that you can navigate out of harm's way and grow in confidence just like I have if you want to join me on this program all yo…
